description: Crypto trading dashboard — perpetual futures monitoring (BANANAS31, COS, DEXE, LYN)

userStories.title: Fix broken render functions for 37 non-working cards
acceptanceCriteria: Each card renders real data from its endpoint
No 'No data' or blank chart states
Verify in browser: card shows live values

userStories.title: Fix OI USDT display + price precision 6 decimals + Loading→No data
acceptanceCriteria: OI shows USDT value not raw contracts
Loading spinner resolves to data or explicit error

userStories.title: Fix empty/broken charts: correlations, vol profile, aggressor
acceptanceCriteria: Correlation matrix renders with real data

userStories.title: Full restart recovery test — simulate crash and verify all cards reload
End-to-end flow: think→brainstorm→spec→AO→PR→CI
acceptanceCriteria: One feature goes through full pipeline
